details.test: Task 1: Cheapest highly rated Napa sunrise shared family flight to cart
Task 2: Best-rated private Napa tour under budget with hotel pickup (and photos if available)
Task 3: Save long sunrise tours with champagne breakfast to wishlist
Task 4: Compare two sunrise tours and book longer one with cancellation protection
Task 5: Purchase $250 digital gift voucher and start checkout
Task 6: Reschedule existing booking ABC123 to new date
Task 7: Add multiple tours to cart and apply BALLOON10 promo code
Task 8: Radius-based search for sunrise with hotel pickup & free cancellation, then book earliest
Task 9: Create anniversary sunrise package in Napa with duration and budget constraints
